title: Synchronicity
label: A&M Records
notes:
"Printed in England" on the spine of the sleeve.
"Made in England" is printed on the centre labels of the vinyl record.
"Original sound recording made by A&M Records Ltd. MCPS/BIEM" also on the centre labels.
Recorded at Air Studios, Montserrat and Le Studio, Quebec.

The album's original cover artwork was available in 36 variations, with different arrangements of the colour stripes and showing different photographs of the band members, which they took themselves.

The format of the runouts is as follows:
Side A: 'SP-3735-A-INT-#', 'RL' and 'M1 SF1 SM#' are etched, everything else appears stamped.
Side B: 'SP-3735-B-INT #' and 'M1SF1 SM#' are etched, everything else appears stamped.
Both runouts contain the Europadisk logo, which is the initials EDP in a circle and also the A&M Mastering Studios trumpet [🎺] logo.

Marketed by Warner Strategic Marketing, a Warner Music Group Company. Made in the Netherlands. LC02982 

[Record labels]
℗ © 1976 Elektra/Asylum Records for the U.S. and WEA International Inc. for the world outside of the U.S. ... Marketed by Warner Strategic Marketing, a Warner Music Group Company. Made in EU. LC02982 

[Cat #s]
RRM1-1084 - on spine, on inner sleeve top left, record labels
8122796161 - on bottom of post production barcode sticker 

[Differentiation and identification]
Most obvious differences from [r6623165] are (i) the "Made in the Netherlands" at the bottom of the rear cover of this release vs. "Made in the EU" on the other, and (ii) the matrix information is different, indicating a different pressing, cut by Chris Bellman rather than Bernie Grundman.
Tracks A3 and B2 Joe Walsh's Guitar credits are misspelt as "Guiter" on the inner sleeve song credits.

Runouts are partially etched/stamped.

This release is roughly similar to [r=7220106], except for the Warner Bros logo (which has been replaced by Warner Records on this one) and the runout identifiers.

This release is almost identical to [r=23218028] apart from the "Made in Czech Republic" sticker on the back, which is not stuck to the cover underneath the shrink, but either on the outside of the shrink or not included. Variant 7, 8 and 9 have "Made in Czech Republic" sticker on the back cover of the sleeve.

The runouts are hand-etched apart from the [Invalid Label] (204142E#/A#), which are laser-etched.
